recommended_actions.title: Adopt Eco-Driving Techniques
recommended_actions.description: Maintain steady speeds, reduce aggressive braking, and keep tires properly inflated to improve fuel efficiency by up to 15%.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Internal combustion engines are significantly less efficient during rapid acceleration and idle, causing unnecessary carbon spikes.

recommended_actions.title: Implement Carpooling or Multi-modal Commuting
recommended_actions.description: Coordinate with a colleague or use public transit twice a week to reduce the frequency of solo-petrol engine usage.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Reducing vehicle miles traveled is the single most effective way to lower personal CO2 emissions for car-dependent individuals.

recommended_actions.title: Prioritize Direct Domestic Destinations
recommended_actions.description: Opt for closer vacation spots reached by train or bus instead of medium-haul flights.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Aviation creates high-altitude emissions including water vapor and nitrogen oxides that have a higher warming impact than ground-based transport.

recommended_actions.title: Meat-Free Mondays and Fridays
recommended_actions.description: Commit to two full days of plant-based eating each week to decrease dependency on high-impact livestock production.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Red meat production requires significantly more land, water, and feed resources, contributing to higher methane and CO2 output per calorie.

recommended_actions.title: Optimize Heating and Cooling Zones
recommended_actions.description: Install a programmable thermostat and lower the temperature by 2 degrees in unused rooms to reduce electricity consumption.
recommended_actions.why_matters: Energy efficiency in residential spaces reduces demand on the power grid, directly lowering your reliance on carbon-intensive energy sources.

chat_messages.content: Hello! I am your Leafstep Climate Coach. I can help you understand your footprint, suggest ways to save carbon, and automatically track your daily activities. Ask me anything, or say 'Coach, log a 15km EV drive' to try automated logging!
